name: cltch-ntwrk-mobile
description: CLTCH.NTWRK mobile wrappers for iOS and Android.

scripts.deploy:hosting: node scripts/guard-deploy.mjs && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting --project cltch-ntwrk-social --account blacklionmediastudio@gmail.com
scripts.sync:mobile: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:ios: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync ios
scripts.sync:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android
